flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Tiffin University are 33% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($35.9k vs $53.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tiffin University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.5k → $34.8k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Tiffin University are 15% below 6-year earnings ($42.5k → $35.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tiffin University rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.9k → $17.7k).
